riskAdjusted.label: Balanced
riskAdjusted.description: Half-Kelly baseline with the shared value screen, a 1.25-unit per-bet cap, and a 4-unit daily budget.
riskAdjusted.optimization_objective: Static balanced default while matched replay coverage remains limited

aggressive.label: Aggressive
aggressive.description: Three-quarter Kelly with the same value screen, a 1.75-unit per-bet cap, and a 6-unit daily budget.
aggressive.optimization_objective: Static aggressive default while matched replay coverage remains limited

capitalPreservation.label: Capital Preservation
capitalPreservation.description: Quarter-Kelly sizing, favorites only, a 0.75-unit per-bet cap, and a 2.5-unit daily budget.
capitalPreservation.optimization_objective: Static conservative default while matched replay coverage remains limited

strategy_optimization.method: Static defaults active until matched replay coverage reaches at least 60 settled games across 20 replay days (current sample: 32 games across 4 days).

summary.note: Replay results use only games with stored pregame forecast and odds snapshots.
